content.full_text:
February 16, 1984

Beti An Hynes  
City Clerk  
101 North David Street  
Perris, CA 92370  

Re: File No. A-84-027  

Dear Ms. Hynes:  

This is to confirm my telephone advice of February 9, 1984, in response to your request to combine the April 12, 1984 post-election filing deadline in connection with the recall election held on February 7, 1984, with the March 29, 1984, first pre-election filing deadline for the May 8, 1984, special election.

Committees primarily formed to support or oppose the recall measure which intend to support or oppose candidates running in the May 8th special election may combine the post-election statement in connection with the February 7th election with the first pre-election statement in connection with the May 8th special election. This "combined" statement will cover the period January 22, 1984, thru March 24, 1984, and must be filed no later than March 29, 1984.

Committees which are not involved in the May 8th election will remain on the recall election filing schedule and will file post-election statements on April 12, 1984.

In addition, if the committees which were primarily formed to support or oppose the recall measure become involved in supporting or opposing candidates in the May 8th special election, they must amend their Statement of Organization (Form 410) to reflect that fact.

Please let me know if you have additional questions.

Sincerely,

Carla J. Wardlow  
Political Reform Consultant
